name: 9th Street Lisco Courts
description: 9th Street Lisco Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fairfield, IA. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Heritage Park
description: Heritage Park is a place to play pickleball in Fairfield, IA. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Maharishi School
description: Come play pickleball at Maharishi School in Fairfield, IA! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: MIU Recreation Center
description: MIU Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fairfield, IA. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Roosevelt Recreation Center and Cambridge SportsPlex
description: Come play pickleball at Roosevelt Recreation Center and Cambridge SportsPlex in Fairfield, IA! There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
